temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man with a mustache, dressed in a black robe, walks slowly and deliberately towards the camera. His right arm is heavily bandaged, and he holds it at his side. The scene is dimly lit with a sickly green hue, and he is framed by a barred window, suggesting a prison or asylum setting. (Storyline: This opening shot introduces a mysterious and menacing character, establishing a tense and ominous mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a close-up of an older man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit. His face is filled with fear and apprehension as he stares intently at someone off-screen, his eyes wide with concern. (Storyline: This cut introduces a second character who is clearly intimidated by the first, establishing a power dynamic and a sense of threat.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, suspenseful music continues.)
